THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LESLIE, KENNETH JACK LESLIE, TRACY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 655 HYDE STREET, APT 14 $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-14-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, $2,000.00 TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $25.00 TO $50.00 PER MONTH BY CASHIER'S CHECK, MONEY ORDER OR CASH STARTING JULY 30, 1993. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
